Skip to contents
ggsegYan 1.0.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog
Yan 2023 homotopic brain parcellation for the 'ggseg' ecosystem. Provides 'ggseg_atlas' objects with 2D polygon geometry and 3D vertex indices. Includes 7-network and 17-network variants at resolutions from 100 to 1000 parcels.

Part of the ggsegverse — Gross Geometry Brain Segmentation Universe
Built with pkgdown
